vendor: TD SYNNEX (pricing artefacts in bundle are IBM ECMSSD configurator outputs)
quote_source: No final distributor/reseller quote is present. Best available pricing basis is the set of IBM configurator TXT exports dated 2026-04-22, corroborated by matching XML files.
revision_or_date: IBM configurator exports dated 2026-04-22; TD SYNNEX covering email dated 2026-04-23

subtotal.basis: Combined list/configurator purchase totals from the three IBM configuration summaries

vat.status: Not stated in the supplied bundle; VAT-inclusive total cannot be confirmed from evidence

total.status: Best available pre-VAT total from bundle; not a final discounted quote

inclusions: Diamondback recurring maintenance totalling GBP 2,900.54 per month
2 x media bundles, each showing 15 x 20-pack LTO-10 cartridges (300 per bundle, 600 total)
4 x SAN24B-7 switch configurations appear intended, inferred from the filename, request email, and total of GBP 257,082.32 equalling 4 x GBP 64,270.58
40 x 10m OM3 LC/LC cables appear intended in total
3 year IBM Storage Expert Care Advanced on the switch configurations
4883-L9A SP Warranty and Maintenance 3Y 24x7 Same Day ORT on the library configurations
exclusions: No final TD SYNNEX quote, discount schedule, or deal-registration-backed sell price
No implementation/installation statement beyond the service or warranty lines shown
Diamondback config explicitly shows No Host/SAN Cable from Plant
assumptions: This summary covers the entire supplied UEA Diamondback batch
The pricing is IBM list/configurator pricing rather than final reseller discounted pricing
Switch quantity of 4 is inferred because extracted switch detail truncates after System 2, while the overall total evidences four identical switch systems
Shipping has been added to the one-time subtotal to derive the best available pre-VAT total
risks: Diamondback drive count discrepancy: request email says 8 LTO10 drives per library and filename says 8xLTO10-FC, but the visible config line shows AGH4 LTO10 FH Fibre Channel Drive Qty 10 per system

Media VOLSER discrepancy: email says starting VOLSER is required for each location, filename says NO-VOLSER, but visible media features encode DUM000 and both visible bundles show the same starting sequence
Switch population needs confirmation: request asks for 14 populated ports (12 SW plus 2 LW), while the visible config shows one 8-port SW SFP bundle, one 8-port SW upgrade, and two LW SFPs
TD SYNNEX email states the configs are for review prior to quoting and that best discounts depend on deal registration approval/reference
Diamondback config warns that ServicePacs cannot be combined with additional services and that custom ServicePacs require scoping assistance
flags: No final quote document present; pricing source is pre-quote configurator output
Switch and library TXT extracts are truncated in the prepared bundle, so some per-system detail is incomplete
